footer.description: Independent credit broker. We find the best loan for you by comparing over 30 banks.
footer.brokerDisclaimer: Prestivio is registered in the OAM Register of Credit Agents and Brokers.

cta.title: Ready to find your ideal loan?
cta.subtitle: The consultation is free and without obligation. An expert advisor will contact you within 48 hours.

contactForm.title: Request a free consultation
contactForm.subtitle: Fill out the form and an advisor will contact you within 48 hours.
contactForm.successMessage: Thank you for your request. One of our advisors will contact you within 48 hours.
contactForm.errorMessage: An error occurred. Please try again later.
contactForm.privacyNote: Your data will be processed in accordance with our Privacy Policy.

notFound.title: Page not found
notFound.message: The page you are looking for does not exist or has been moved.

legal.contactPrompt: For questions about this policy, contact us:

privacy.metaDescription: Information on the processing of personal data collected by Prestivio.
privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: This Privacy Policy describes how Prestivio collects, uses, and protects your personal data.

s1.heading: Data collected
body: We collect name, email, phone, and information about the requested loan when you fill out the contact form.

s2.heading: Use of data
body: Your data is used to contact you and evaluate your financing request.

s3.heading: Sharing
body: Your data may be shared with partner financial institutions only for application processing purposes.

cookie.metaDescription: Information on cookies used by the Prestivio website.
cookie.title: Cookie Policy
cookie.intro: This Cookie Policy describes the cookies used by the Prestivio website.

s1.heading: Technical cookies
body: We use technical cookies necessary for the website to function.

s2.heading: Analytics cookies
body: We use analytics cookies to understand how you use the website and improve it.

terms.metaDescription: Terms and conditions of use of Prestivio services.
terms.title: Terms and Conditions
terms.intro: The following Terms and Conditions govern the use of Prestivio services.

s1.heading: Services
body: Prestivio acts as a credit intermediary between you and financial institutions.

s2.heading: Liability
body: Loan approval depends exclusively on the lending institution.

gdpr.metaDescription: GDPR notice on the processing of personal data under EU Regulation 2016/679.
gdpr.title: GDPR Notice
gdpr.intro: This notice describes the data subject's rights under EU Regulation 2016/679 (GDPR).

s1.heading: Legal basis
body: Data processing is based on consent and the performance of a contract.

s2.heading: Data subject rights
body: You have the right to access, rectify, erase, restrict, and port your data.

s3.heading: Data controller
body: The data controller is Prestivio S.p.A., Via Manzoni 12, 20121 Milan.

disclaimer.metaDescription: Legal disclaimer on the use of Prestivio services and information.
disclaimer.title: Disclaimer
disclaimer.intro: The information published on the Prestivio website is for informational purposes and does not constitute a binding offer.

s1.heading: Nature of service
body: Prestivio acts as a credit broker. Loan disbursement depends on the bank.

s2.heading: Limitation of liability
body: The conditions shown are indicative. The final one is communicated by the lending bank.
